data.body: Random #TTRPG idea: a way to run a group of characters with amnesia. Give them all blank character sheets. Then let them fill them in as they figure things out. You can do this with hard set characters. Or get weird/silly and use this to cover actually creating the characters as they go.

data.body: Another consideration: you can be wrong or really wrong (or right) in the sense that, say, a week before the invasion you cld assert, in effect, there is virtually zero chance Putin pulls the trigger vs asserting there’s a 51% chance he doesn’t. And ofc people typically use vague words for risk. 6/x
